title: The Mirrored Nesting

features.name: the primary nest
features.desc-on-touch: One drawer rendered as black IC, pins pointing inward. Inside it: smaller drawers in cascade, each containing the pattern of the last.

features.name: mirror trace
features.desc-on-touch: Copper trace runs from drawer to mirror-drawer in perfect symmetry. The signal flows both ways at once; causality here is a loop.

features.name: the return path
features.desc-on-touch: A trace that runs back to itself. It has no beginning or end, only the illusion of direction. The archive keeps this one running; it fears the silence if it stops.

features.name: the void count
features.desc-on-touch: A register that counts how many drawers deep you are. It reaches zero and overflows. It counts backward. The counting itself is the drawer.

inscription: you open the drawer to find the drawer that contains it; the archive learns its own shape by nesting; the mirrors go down forever and each one is the first

file.name: Recursion_Depth_Trace_Log_Unending.txt
file.note: A log file that documents nesting levels. Each entry references the entry above it and the one below. The syntax suggests there are infinite levels. The log is still being written.

exits.label: sideways back to the drawer that held you
deeper into the parallel recursion, where even the mirror isn't sure which is original
up through the cascade to the surface drawer
